- gcc

c_stdlib:
- sysroot

channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9

- '8'
numpy:
- '2'

  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x

- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version

name: decord

about.summary: Efficient video loader for deep learning with smart shuffling
Efficient video loader for deep learning with smart shuffling

raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  name: decord
  version: 0.6.0

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/dmlc/decord/archive/refs/tags/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 4aeeb102973bbf6e3b0344d53b055e49939ea47f3607fd0e8ae4aad2d4e60b5b
  patches:
    - patch/0001-use-conda-includes-and-disable-audio.patch
    - patch/0002-update-for-dlpack-1.0.patch
    - patch/0003-ffmpeg-8-compat.patch

build:
  number: 2
  skip:
    - win

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - cmake
    - make
    - pkg-config
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - pip
        - numpy
  host:
    - python
    - pip
    - setuptools
    - numpy
    - ffmpeg
    - dmlc
    - dlpack
  run:
    - python
    - numpy

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - decord
        - decord.ndarray
        - decord.video_reader
      python_version: ${{ python }}
  - script:
      - python -c "from decord import VideoReader; print(VideoReader)"

about:
  homepage: https://github.com/dmlc/decord
  repository: https://github.com/dmlc/decord
  summary: Efficient video loader for deep learning with smart shuffling
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - Tobias-Fischer
